title: Tom's Pets
description: Simple present — pets and daily routines with animals
scene: A cozy living room. Two cats curl up on a soft grey sofa. A dog wags its tail near the front door. Sunlight streams through the window as Tom gets ready for the morning.
sample_context: You're starting with basic English — describing everyday things. This story uses simple present tense with common verbs and animals. Practice the 's' endings on third-person verbs: likes, feeds, plays, sleeps, runs, loves, makes.
